title: Mephitidia wallichii
taxonomy: Mephitidia wallichii is a species within the family Santalaceae, which is a group of parasitic plants. The Santalaceae family is further classified under the order Santalales, a group of flowering plants. This classification is based on the plant's morphology and its parasitic nature. The family Santalaceae is a relatively small but diverse group of plants, with various species found in different parts of the world. The exact classification of Mephitidia wallichii may vary depending on the source and the latest taxonomic research.
